reCheckContext.developerFix: ImageDropUploader now reads meta._thumbnail_id (primary) and writes both featured_media and meta._thumbnail_id on select, matching the project's custom featured image pattern
reCheckContext.fqa001Resolution: RESOLVED — NOT_APPLICABLE. The project intentionally does not use WordPress thumbnail support. inc/functions/featured-image.php registers _thumbnail_id and focal_point as meta fields for both post and team_member post types, and calls remove_post_type_support('post', 'thumbnail'). meta._thumbnail_id is the underlying WordPress meta key read by get_post_thumbnail_id() in PHP, so the card-team-member.php frontend template works correctly without native thumbnail support.
focusChecks: onSelect writes both featured_media and meta._thumbnail_id
All previously passing checks still pass

resolvedFromPreviousRuns: FQA-001 — thumbnail support flagged as missing in previous two runs. Resolved: NOT_APPLICABLE. Project uses custom meta-based featured image pattern via inc/functions/featured-image.php. meta._thumbnail_id is registered for team_member and is the standard WordPress _thumbnail_id meta key. get_post_thumbnail_id() reads this key in PHP correctly without native thumbnail support in post type.

build.detail: taktician_validate_all: build passes with zero errors. Zero TypeScript compilation errors. Zero lint errors in any TeamMemberCPT file.

lint.detail: 2 pre-existing lint errors in FullWidthMedia/FullWidthMedia.tsx (no-base-control-with-label-without-id, line 221) and TestimonialsCarousel/TestimonialsCarousel.tsx (no-nested-ternary, line 164). 8 pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings across Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs. Identical to previous two QA runs. None are in TeamMemberCPT files.

registration.detail: taktician_validate_all registration: all sub-checks pass — schema, naming, fileReferences, childBlocks, attributeTypes. block.json unchanged: takt/team-member-cpt, apiVersion:3, category:takt-theme-template, inserter:false, multiple:false, attributes:{}, no render field.

customFeaturedImagePattern.detail: inc/functions/featured-image.php confirms the project-wide custom pattern: (1) theme_register_featured_image_meta() registers _thumbnail_id (type:number) and focal_point (type:object with x/y) as meta fields for both post and team_member post types; (2) theme_disable_post_thumbnail() calls remove_post_type_support('post','thumbnail') — standard thumbnail support deliberately removed for posts; (3) team_member also has no 'thumbnail' in supports BY DESIGN. meta._thumbnail_id is the underlying WordPress _thumbnail_id meta key which get_post_thumbnail_id() reads in PHP, so card-team-member.php displays photos correctly. FQA-001 from previous runs is NOT_APPLICABLE.

imageDropUploaderMetaRead.detail: TeamMemberCPT.tsx lines 115-122: ImageDropUploader image prop is { id: meta._thumbnail_id || featuredMediaId || null, focalPoint: meta.focal_point }. Primary source is meta._thumbnail_id (the custom pattern meta field). featuredMediaId (from getEditedPostAttribute('featured_media')) is a secondary fallback. This mirrors how featured-image.tsx reads the image: id: postThumbnail || meta._thumbnail_id. The Meta type (line 13) correctly declares _thumbnail_id as number|null and focal_point as {x:number;y:number}.

imageDropUploaderOnSelect.detail: TeamMemberCPT.tsx lines 123-131: onSelect writes editPost({ featured_media: selected.id || null, meta: { ...meta, _thumbnail_id: selected.id || null } }). This matches exactly the pattern in featured-image.tsx (lines 44-52) which also writes both featured_media and meta._thumbnail_id simultaneously. The meta spread (...meta) preserves existing meta values including focal_point. Note: the block body ImageDropUploader does not write focal_point on select — the featured-image.tsx sidebar panel writes focal_point via image.focalPoint. This is acceptable: the block body is for quick photo selection while the sidebar panel provides focal point control.

metaPersistence.detail: REST API GET /wp/v2/team_member/221?context=edit confirms: meta._thumbnail_id:0 (registered, writable), meta.focal_point:[] (registered), first_name:'Alex', last_name:'Johnson', excerpt.raw:'Senior Developer'. All fields persist correctly. _thumbnail_id is 0 on the test post (no image set yet, which is expected for a draft test post).

sidebarPanel.detail: team-member-cpt-panel.tsx unchanged. TextControl (first_name), TextControl (last_name), TextareaControl (excerpt/role). Post type guard 'if (postType !== team_member) return null'. Featured image handled by featured-image.tsx sidebar panel (PluginDocumentSettingPanel 'takt-featured-image-panel') which includes team_member in POST_TYPES and uses MediaUploadPanel with focal point support.

templateLock.detail: REST API /wp/v2/types/team_member confirms template:[['takt/team-member-cpt']], template_lock:'all' — unchanged from previous QA runs.

postTypeGuard.detail: TeamMemberCPT.tsx line 102: if (postType !== 'team_member') return null. team-member-cpt-panel.tsx line 38: if (postType !== 'team_member') return null. Both guards intact.

markupStructure.detail: No structural regressions. article wrapper classes unchanged. p-4 > overflow-hidden rounded-xl photo container unchanged. ImageDropUploader sits inside this container correctly. Content area (flex flex-1 flex-col gap-6 p-6), department badge, name div.text-header-3 with dual RichText spans, role RichText div.text-header-5, mt-auto CTA with TertiaryArrow — all unchanged and matching card-team-member.php.
